metadata.description: Agentic workflow automation via pi packages and Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: ac-workflow
plugins.description: Spec workflow, MUX orchestration, and product management

plugins.name: ac-git
plugins.description: Git automation - PRs, releases, branches, worktrees

plugins.name: ac-qa
plugins.description: Quality assurance - E2E testing, PR review, browser automation

plugins.name: ac-tools
plugins.description: Utilities - integrations, dry-run, prototyping, asset management

plugins.name: ac-meta
plugins.description: Meta-prompting and self-improvement - skill writer, hook writer

plugins.name: ac-safety
plugins.description: Security guardrails - credential protection, destructive command blocking, write scope enforcement, supply chain control, browser restrictions

plugins.name: ac-audit
plugins.description: Tool audit logging - JSONL audit trail and real-time systemMessage display
